paths.name: @crisp/models
paths.message: Cross-slice, a feature is reachable through its published surface only: import @crisp/models/contracts. The full interface (service + ports) is for the composition root in apps/server.

paths.name: @crisp/conversations
paths.message: Cross-slice, a feature is reachable through its published surface only: import @crisp/conversations/contracts (or /testing in tests). The full interface is for the composition root in apps/server.

paths.name: @crisp/feedback
paths.message: Cross-slice, a feature is reachable through its published surface only: import @crisp/feedback/contracts. The full interface is for the composition root in apps/server.

paths.name: @crisp/runs
paths.message: Cross-slice, a feature is reachable through its published surface only: import @crisp/runs/contracts (or /testing in tests). The full interface is for the composition root in apps/server.

paths.name: @crisp/titling
paths.message: Titling publishes no contracts — only the composition root in apps/server may use it.
